seoTitle: Connect Your Email to HubSpot CRM: Easy Setup
metaDescription: Link your Gmail, Microsoft 365, or IMAP inbox to HubSpot CRM with OAuth, then set logging rules and verify bi-directional email syncing.
intro: Connecting your inbox to HubSpot means every relevant email conversation gets logged automatically against the right contact record. This guide covers finding the email integration settings, authorizing your provider through OAuth, and setting up blocklists so sensitive messages stay private. It wraps up with confirming the sync is actually working.

steps.heading: Open Email Integrations settings
steps.body: Go to your HubSpot account Settings and find the Email Integrations tab under General Preferences.

steps.heading: Choose your provider
steps.body: Click Connect Personal Email and select Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, or a custom IMAP setup.

steps.heading: Accept the ingestion agreement
steps.body: Toggle the automated inbox ingestion agreement and click Connect to proceed.

steps.heading: Pass the OAuth handshake
steps.body: Complete your provider's OAuth screen to grant HubSpot permission to sync with your inbox.

steps.heading: Set logging rules and blocklists
steps.body: Adjust global communication logging rules and add address blocklists for any sensitive contacts.

steps.heading: Verify the connection
steps.body: Check your connected status row and send a test message to confirm syncing is active.

faq.question: Which email providers can I connect to HubSpot?
faq.answer: You can connect Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, or a custom IMAP-based inbox through the Email Integrations settings.

faq.question: Will every email I send get logged in HubSpot?
faq.answer: Logging behavior depends on your rules and blocklists, so you can control which addresses get excluded from tracking.

faq.question: Is my email password stored by HubSpot?
faq.answer: No, the connection uses OAuth authentication, so HubSpot never sees or stores your email password directly.

faq.question: How do I confirm the sync is working?
faq.answer: After connecting, check your status row in settings and send a test email to verify it appears in your CRM timeline.
